* Province of IRCC inland office at which the asylum claim was made or, if not applicable/available, the last known address of the claimant or non-inland office at which the asylum claim was made. 

Notes:
— Please note that all values between 0 and 5 are shown as “--”. This is done to prevent individuals from being identified when IRCC data is compiled and compared to other publicly available statistics. All other values are rounded to the closest multiple of 5 for the same reason; as a result of rounding, data may not sum to the totals indicated.
— The data in this file show numbers of individuals who have made a refugee claim at a port of entry or at a designated IRCC office.
— Other offices include data on claimants that did not submitted their claim at Border, Airport or Inland offices.
— Data are preliminary and subject to change.
